name: Crown Point Vineyards
excerpt: One of the most compelling estates in Happy Canyon. The Cabernet Sauvignon here has structure and elegance that surprises people who haven't explored this corner of Santa Barbara County. A must-visit for any serious collector.

name: Sine Qua Non
excerpt: Manfred Krankl's estate produces some of the most sought-after wines in California. Each vintage tells a completely different story — the Syrahs here are unlike anything else produced in the New World.

name: Domaine de la Romanée-Conti
excerpt: The benchmark against which all Pinot Noir is measured. A pilgrimage every serious wine enthusiast should make at least once.
